title: Smart AI routing explained
summary: IBM Technology reports that AI labs are prioritizing intelligent routing mechanisms over raw model size. Cost efficiency and trustworthiness are now central concerns driving this strategic shift.
writeup: This IBM Technology video explains smart AI routing, the practice of directing queries through intelligent routing mechanisms rather than relying on raw model size. It frames a strategic shift among AI labs, which are now prioritizing routing over scale. The drivers are cost efficiency and trustworthiness, presented as the central concerns behind this change.
